args.text: Severity assessment confirmed: HIGH. Session-fixation vulnerability in token refresh path affecting auth-api and session-store.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
Patch window confirmed for CVE-2026-30117 remediation.

Affected services and target versions:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

Deployment will proceed in order: auth-api first, then session-store.

All staff will be required to re-establish sessions following patch completion.

args.text: Both services patched and verified. auth-api deployed to v5.8.4, session-store deployed to v2.2.9. Deployments confirmed operational.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching is complete and verified.

Verified versions:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

All patches have been deployed and confirmed operational. Credential rotation will proceed as scheduled.

args.text: Credential rotation completed per rotation-checklist.md: All active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, and old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
Arclight security maintenance has been completed tonight.

As part of this maintenance, all active sessions have been invalidated and credentials rotated for enhanced security.

Please sign in again to your accounts when you next access Arclight systems. Your new session will be established with updated security credentials.

Thank you for your attention to this important security update.
